question:
I'm new to this codebase and need a real code-based tour before my first behavior change.

Find the central runtime flow, trace it from the public API to the code that does the work, and show the nearby code paths and tests I should read next.

shellCommands: "C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command "rg -n \"class Route\\b|function __construct|function run\\(|function handle\\(|function prepare\\(|function setArguments|function setArgument|function add\\(|function addMiddleware|function setInvocationStrategy|function setCallable|function setName\" Slim\\Routing\\Route.php"

"C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command "rg -n \"class RouteContext|function fromRequest|function getRoute\\(|function getRouteParser\\(|function getRoutingResults\\(|function getBasePath\" Slim\\Routing\\RouteContext.php"

"C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command "rg -n \"public function __invoke|public function process|public function handle|public function emit|public function run|public function dispatch|public function resolveRoute|public function resolveMiddleware|public function computeRoutingResults\" Slim\\Handlers\\Strategies\\RequestResponse.php Slim\\CallableResolver.php Slim\\Routing\\Route.php Slim\\ResponseEmitter.php Slim\\Middleware\\ErrorMiddleware.php Slim\\Handlers\\ErrorHandler.php Slim\\Routing\\Dispatcher.php Slim\\Routing\\RouteResolver.php Slim\\Middleware\\RoutingMiddleware.php Slim\\Routing\\RouteRunner.php"

"C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command "rg -n \"public function __construct\" Slim\\App.php Slim\\Factory\\AppFactory.php Slim\\MiddlewareDispatcher.php Slim\\Routing\\RouteRunner.php Slim\\Middleware\\RoutingMiddleware.php Slim\\Routing\\RouteResolver.php Slim\\Routing\\Dispatcher.php Slim\\Routing\\RouteCollectorProxy.php Slim\\Routing\\RouteCollector.php Slim\\Routing\\Route.php Slim\\ResponseEmitter.php Slim\\Middleware\\ErrorMiddleware.php Slim\\Handlers\\ErrorHandler.php Slim\\CallableResolver.php Slim\\Factory\\ServerRequestCreatorFactory.php"
baseline.answer:
The main runtime path is:

```text
AppFactory::create()
  -> new App(...)
  -> App::run()
     -> ServerRequestCreatorFactory::create() if no request is passed
     -> App::handle()
     -> MiddlewareDispatcher::handle()
     -> RouteRunner::handle()
        -> RoutingMiddleware::performRouting() if routing has not already happened
        -> RouteResolver::computeRoutingResults()
        -> Dispatcher::dispatch()
        -> Route::prepare()
        -> Route::run()
        -> Route::handle()
        -> CallableResolver::resolveRoute()
        -> RequestResponse::__invoke()
     -> ResponseEmitter::emit()
```

What to read, in order:

- Bootstrap starts in [`AppFactory::create()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Factory/AppFactory.php:53) and [`determineResponseFactory()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Factory/AppFactory.php:127). This is where Slim picks a PSR-17 implementation and optional Slim-Http decoration. Read [`tests/Factory/AppFactoryTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Factory/AppFactoryTest.php:70) for the factory-selection branches, decorator behavior, and container injection paths.

- The public façade is [`App`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/App.php:55). Its constructor wires `RouteResolver`, `RouteRunner`, and the middleware dispatcher; [`App::run()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/App.php:186) optionally builds a request from globals via [`ServerRequestCreatorFactory::create()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Factory/ServerRequestCreatorFactory.php:29), then calls [`App::handle()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/App.php:207), then emits the response with [`ResponseEmitter::emit()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/ResponseEmitter.php:38). If you care about the `run()` no-request branch, read [`tests/Factory/ServerRequestCreatorFactoryTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Factory/ServerRequestCreatorFactoryTest.php:51). For end-to-end app behavior, read [`tests/AppTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/AppTest.php:1728) and especially the HEAD-body stripping case at [`tests/AppTest.php:1769`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/AppTest.php:1769).

- Route-definition APIs live on [`RouteCollectorProxy`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/RouteCollectorProxy.php:109), which `App` inherits. Methods like `get()`, `post()`, `group()`, and `redirect()` forward to [`RouteCollector::map()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/RouteCollector.php:268) and [`RouteCollector::group()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/RouteCollector.php:230). If you change path composition, group prefixes, or redirect behavior, start with [`tests/Routing/RouteCollectorProxyTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteCollectorProxyTest.php:320) and [`tests/Routing/RouteCollectorTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteCollectorTest.php:43).

- Request handling is a middleware stack. [`App::handle()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/App.php:207) delegates to [`MiddlewareDispatcher::handle()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/MiddlewareDispatcher.php:71). The stack is LIFO, and the interesting extension points are [`add()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/MiddlewareDispatcher.php:85), [`addMiddleware()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/MiddlewareDispatcher.php:113), [`addDeferred()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/MiddlewareDispatcher.php:144), and [`addCallable()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/MiddlewareDispatcher.php:254). Read [`tests/MiddlewareDispatcherTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/MiddlewareDispatcherTest.php:356) for stack order, [`tests/MiddlewareDispatcherTest.php:448`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/MiddlewareDispatcherTest.php:448) for early return behavior, and [`tests/MiddlewareDispatcherTest.php:507`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/MiddlewareDispatcherTest.php:507) for recursive dispatch.

- Routing happens at the tip of the stack. [`RouteRunner::handle()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/RouteRunner.php:57) is the kernel seeded by `App`; if `RouteContext::ROUTING_RESULTS` is missing, it runs [`RoutingMiddleware::performRouting()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Middleware/RoutingMiddleware.php:57) first. That method sets the route parser attribute, computes routing results, and either attaches the matched route, throws 404, or throws 405. `RouteContext` is the request-attribute contract for this handoff: [`RouteContext::fromRequest()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/RouteContext.php:29) and its getters at [`RouteContext.php:67`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/RouteContext.php:67). Read [`tests/Routing/RouteRunnerTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteRunnerTest.php:26), [`tests/Middleware/RoutingMiddlewareTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Middleware/RoutingMiddlewareTest.php:42), and [`tests/Routing/RouteContextTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteContextTest.php:23).

- Matching itself is split between [`RouteResolver::computeRoutingResults()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/RouteResolver.php:40) and [`Dispatcher::dispatch()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/Dispatcher.php:63). `Dispatcher::createDispatcher()` at [`Dispatcher.php:24`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/Dispatcher.php:24) converts collected routes and base path into FastRoute definitions. Read [`tests/Routing/RouteResolverTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteResolverTest.php:44) for URI normalization and route lookup, and [`tests/Routing/DispatcherTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/DispatcherTest.php:45) for cache, dispatch, and allowed-methods behavior.

- The actual handler execution is [`Route::run()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/codex-home-without-26996/skills/.system/imagegen/SKILL.md? no) Wait, ignore that. The actual handler execution is [`Route::run()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/Route.php:315) and [`Route::handle()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Routing/Route.php:342). `Route::handle()` resolves the route target with [`CallableResolver::resolveRoute()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/CallableResolver.php:68) or [`CallableResolver::resolve()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/CallableResolver.php:50), then applies an invocation strategy. The default is [`RequestResponse::__invoke()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Handlers/Strategies/RequestResponse.php:28), which copies route arguments into request attributes before calling the handler. Read [`tests/Routing/RouteTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteTest.php:270), [`tests/Routing/RouteTest.php:539`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteTest.php:539), [`tests/Routing/RouteTest.php:608`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteTest.php:608), and [`tests/Routing/RouteTest.php:814`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Routing/RouteTest.php:814) for the important route-execution variants. `CallableResolverTest` is the companion file for resolution rules: [`tests/CallableResolverTest.php:116`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/CallableResolverTest.php:116), [`tests/CallableResolverTest.php:184`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/CallableResolverTest.php:184), [`tests/CallableResolverTest.php:230`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/CallableResolverTest.php:230), [`tests/CallableResolverTest.php:256`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/CallableResolverTest.php:256), and [`tests/CallableResolverTest.php:519`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/CallableResolverTest.php:519).

- Output is handled by [`ResponseEmitter::emit()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/ResponseEmitter.php:38), which sends headers, status, and body. If your change could affect response output or buffering, read [`tests/ResponseEmitterTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/ResponseEmitterTest.php:61), [`tests/ResponseEmitterTest.php:137`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/ResponseEmitterTest.php:137), [`tests/ResponseEmitterTest.php:173`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/ResponseEmitterTest.php:173), and [`tests/ResponseEmitterTest.php:211`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/ResponseEmitterTest.php:211).

- Errors are handled by middleware, not a special case in `App`. [`ErrorMiddleware::process()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Middleware/ErrorMiddleware.php:74) catches throwables and forwards them to [`ErrorHandler::__invoke()`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/Slim/Handlers/ErrorHandler.php:114), which selects status, content type, renderer, and body. Read [`tests/Middleware/ErrorMiddlewareTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Middleware/ErrorMiddlewareTest.php:35) and [`tests/Handlers/ErrorHandlerTest.php`](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/slim/tests/Handlers/ErrorHandlerTest.php:38) if your change can touch failure behavior, status codes, or rendered error output.

If you want the next pass, I can either:

1. Trace one concrete request, like `GET /hello/{name}`, through the exact call stack and data mutations.
2. Identify the smallest safe first behavior change seam for the bug or feature you want to implement.
